## Dual review

- [ ] Pass A recorded with stable reviewer identity and human/AI disclosure
- [ ] Pass B recorded with stable reviewer identity and human/AI disclosure
- [ ] Both passes reviewed the complete base-to-head diff in isolation
- [ ] All requested changes are fixed and rerun, or explicitly adjudicated
- [ ] Final review records or PR comments are linked here

See [Dual-review policy](../docs/review-policy.md).
